title: GT:NH No Nerf
description: Revert changes that nerf something in the modpack GT: New Horizonhs.
body:
# GT:New Horizons - No Nerf

Developed to revert changes that nerf something in GTNH.

[MCMOD（MC中文百科）](https://www.mcmod.cn/class/10327.html)

## Choose Version

Use the correct version, unless you want to see your console spamming with errors!

| GTNN | GTNH |
| :-: | :-: |
| v1.0.0 | v2.3.3+ (tested on v2.3.3) |
| v1.1.0 | v2.3.5+ (tested on v2.3.6, v2.4.0) |
| v1.2.0 | v2.5.0+ (tested on v2.5.1) |
| v1.3.0 | v2.5.1+ (tested on v2.5.1) |
| v1.4.2 | v2.6.0+ (tested on v2.6.0) |
| v1.5.0 | v2.7.0+ (tested on v2.7.0) |

## Features

- Re-added Disassemblers(for gtnh v2.3.3)(Not including the big machine version. Multiple recipe blacklists are missing when adding back. Let me know if some recipe is broken!)
- Preventing Iron Fences on Lightning Rod being destroyed when generating power(for v2.3.3)
- Support Laser Hatches on Large Essentia Generator (for v2.3.5)
- ~~Revert the Supercritical changes (contributed by @koiNoCirculation)~~ (removed due to lack of maintenance)
- Revert the Eye of Harmony changes (for v2.5.x) *(will be removed due to lack of maintenance)*
- Added Large Processing Factory as it is planned to be removed

## Known Issues

See [gtnh-no-nerf#10](https://github.com/Taskeren/gtnh-no-nerf/issues/10)
